footer.tagline: AI-powered solutions and enterprise software built for African businesses ready to scale.

home.heroDesc: NovaStack Africa builds modern, AI-powered software for African enterprises — web applications, business platforms, and analytics dashboards built to perform.
home.servicesDesc1: From internal tools to customer-facing platforms, we build modern web applications that are fast, reliable, and designed to scale with your business.
home.servicesDesc2: Every project starts with a deep understanding of your business processes — then we architect and build software that fits precisely, with no unnecessary complexity.
home.sub2Desc: Core operational platforms that centralize your processes.
home.sub3Desc: Secure, branded portals for real-time client access.
home.sub4Desc: Interactive analytics that turn data into decisions.
home.aiDesc: We don't add AI as an afterthought. Our solutions are architected from the ground up with artificial intelligence at their core — enabling automation, real-time insights, and decision support at every level of your operations.
home.aiPoint1: Custom AI agents that automate complex business workflows
home.aiPoint2: Copilots that amplify your team's productivity
home.aiPoint3: Predictive models tuned to your industry data
home.aiPoint4: Natural language interfaces for existing systems
home.whyDesc: Technical depth combined with relentless focus on business outcomes.
home.why1Desc: Intelligence built in from day one — not added as an afterthought.
home.why2Desc: Every solution is measured by your outcomes, not feature counts.
home.why3Desc: From concept to production in weeks. Speed without compromise.
home.why4Desc: Built for scale, security, and the reliability your operations demand.
home.why5Desc: Deep understanding of local markets, constraints, and growth ambitions.
home.why6Desc: Technologies chosen for performance and long-term maintainability.
home.ctaDesc: Tell us about your challenges. We'll bring the expertise, the team, and the technology.

services.title: Application Development
services.desc: From internal business tools to customer-facing platforms, we design and build modern software that is fast, reliable, and built to grow with your organization.
services.deliverTitle: Four types of software we build
services.deliverDesc: Each engagement is scoped and architected to match your exact use case — no templates, no shortcuts.
services.sub1Desc: Full-stack applications built with modern frameworks — performant, secure, and production-ready. From internal tools to customer-facing portals, we engineer software that scales with your ambitions.
services.sub2Desc: Core operational platforms that digitize and centralize your most critical business processes. We architect systems that serve as the backbone of your digital operations.
services.sub3Desc: Branded, secure portals that give your clients real-time access to their data and services. Strengthen relationships while reducing your support overhead.
services.sub4Desc: Interactive analytics dashboards that turn your raw data into actionable business intelligence. Make faster, better decisions with data visualizations built for your exact KPIs.
services.processDesc: A structured approach that ensures clarity, quality, and zero surprises from kickoff to launch.
services.step1Desc: We immerse ourselves in your business — processes, constraints, and goals — before writing a single line of code.
services.step2Desc: We design a technical blueprint that matches your needs today and scales with your growth tomorrow.
services.step3Desc: Agile sprints with weekly demos. You see progress continuously, not at the end.
services.step4Desc: Production launch with thorough testing, performance validation, and team onboarding.
services.step5Desc: Post-launch support, iteration cycles, and continuous improvements based on real usage data.
services.industryDesc: We've delivered solutions across Banking, Telecom, Logistics, Government, Healthcare, Retail, and Datacenter — with deep understanding of each sector's constraints and compliance requirements.
services.ctaDesc: Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll assess your needs and scope a solution.

about.title: Built for Africa's
about.desc: We are a modern enterprise software company born in Abidjan, built for the continent — combining cutting-edge AI with deep business acumen to transform how African organizations operate.
about.visionContent: To become Africa's leading enterprise technology partner — known for delivering intelligent, scalable, and impactful digital solutions that elevate businesses to world-class standards.
about.missionContent: To accelerate the digital transformation of African enterprises through AI-powered application development — building modern, scalable software that fits your business with precision and delivers real impact.
about.approachDesc1: Our engagement model is built around understanding your business deeply before writing a single line of code. We immerse ourselves in your processes, your constraints, and your ambitions.
about.approachDesc2: Then we architect solutions that don't just work today — they scale with your growth, adapt to new requirements, and continuously improve through AI-powered feedback loops.
about.approachItem3: Weekly stakeholder updates and live demos
about.valuesDesc: Six principles that shape every engagement, every decision, every line of code.
about.val1Desc: Every technical decision is anchored in your business objectives. We don't build for the sake of building.
about.val2Desc: We move fast without cutting corners. Tight execution cycles, clear milestones, zero ambiguity.
about.val3Desc: We invest in your success beyond the initial delivery. Your growth is our success metric.
about.val4Desc: Designed for the realities of African enterprise — infrastructure, scale, and ambition.
about.val5Desc: We stay ahead of the curve so you don't have to. AI, automation, and emerging technologies embedded by default.
about.val6Desc: We work alongside your teams, not just for them. Knowledge transfer is part of every engagement.
about.ctaDesc: Let's discuss your project and how NovaStack Africa can help you scale.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Let's start a conversation
contact.desc: Tell us about your project. We'll respond within 24 hours with an initial assessment.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your challenge, current situation, and what outcome you're looking for...
contact.errorMsg: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or contact us directly by email.

industries.label: Industries
industries.title: Precision-built for every sector
industries.desc: We understand that every industry has unique constraints, regulations, and opportunities. Our solutions are tailored to the specific realities of each sector.
industries.ctaDesc: We work across many more verticals. Tell us about your context — we'll find the right solution.
industries.ind1Desc: Compliance automation, fraud detection, customer intelligence platforms, and digital banking solutions built for the modern financial institution.
industries.ind2Desc: Network monitoring systems, customer experience platforms, and AI-driven churn prediction for telecom operators across Africa.
industries.ind3Desc: Fleet management, route optimization, warehouse automation, and real-time tracking solutions for modern logistics operations.
industries.ind4Desc: Infrastructure monitoring, automated ticketing, incident management, and capacity planning tools for critical IT environments.
industries.ind5Desc: Inventory management, demand forecasting, loyalty platforms, and omnichannel retail solutions powered by AI.
industries.ind6Desc: Digital service portals, document management, citizen engagement platforms, and workflow digitization for public institutions.
industries.ind7Desc: Patient management systems, medical records digitization, appointment automation, and health data analytics platforms.
